member.name: P:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.BundleSearchSpec.SearchConfig.SafeZoneDefn.InstanceId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pattern Instance Id ofthe safezone pattern. The first instance of a pattern is 1.

member.name: P:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.BundleSearchSpec.SearchConfig.SafeZoneDefn.BurstIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the Burst of the matching pattern. The first burst is 0.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Validator function.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Decoder function.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Assembly (dll) where the Validator and Decoder are located.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Full Namespace and Class where the Validator and Decoder are located.

member.summary: Defines the .

member.summary: Gets or sets the PatConfigSetpoint Module to use. Defaults to CCRModuleName from the TEstProgramSpec..

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the Product/project that this configuration refers too.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the Instance to get the corner frequency from.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the Product/project that this configuration refers too.

member.summary: Gets the name of the Schema file associated with this class.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the Product/project that this configuration refers too.

member.name: P:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.TestProgramSpec.PatConfigModule
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the PatConfig Module to use for any PatConfig/Setpoints.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the list of power rail mappings.

member.summary: Defines the .

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the PatConfig Module to use for any PatConfig/Setpoints.

member.name: P:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.TestProgramSpec.PowerRailMapping.FlowDomain
member.summary: Gets or sets the Domain to use to get the Flow number.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Map from Concurrent instance to VminForward Instance.

member.name: P:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.TestProgramSpec.PowerRailMapping.InstanceToPowerRail
member.summary: Gets or sets the Map from Concurrent instance to PowerRail.

member.name: T:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.Utilities
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.Utilities.LoadJsonFile``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generic to load the Json file type.
member.param: Name of the JSON file to load.
Name of the Schema file to validate the json against.
member.returns: Object type generated from loading the file.
member.exception: FatalException thrown if there are any schema violations.

member.name: M:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.Utilities.GetSchema(System.String)
member.summary: Find the schema file and convert it into a JsonSchema object.
member.param: Name (no path) of the schema file to find and load.
member.returns: Returns JsonSchema object contained in the file.
member.exception: FileNotFoundException exception thrown if the schema file cannot be located.

member.summary: Defines the .

member.summary: Returns a HashSet of failing Power Domains from the ICaptureFailureTest results.

member.summary: Defines the .

member.summary: Gets or sets the Fail Pin to Power Resource map.

member.name: T:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.IConcurrentTestManager
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.IConcurrentTestManager.ApplySetPointsForCornerFrequencies(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Applies the PatConfig Setpoints for the IP/Corners specified by the Bundle Search Specification.

member.name: M:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.IConcurrentTestManager.GetFailingPowerRails(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the names of the individual PowerRails that fail the given Functional Test as defined in the Concurrent Content Spec config file.

member.name: M:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.IConcurrentTestManager.UpdateStartAndPreBurstFromFailure(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Updates the starting pattern and preburst based on the most recent failure and the safezone definition.

member.name: M:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.IConcurrentTestManager.UpdateStartAndPreBurstFromCurrentStart(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Updates the starting pattern and preburst based on the current starting pattern and the safezone definition.

member.name: M:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.IConcurrentTestManager.GetPowerRailToVminForwardingCornerMap(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Create a map of Power Rails to VminForwarding Corner names and Flows for this manager.
member.returns: List of PowerRailMapping containing the power rail and vminforwarding information.

member.name: M:Prime.ConcurrentTestService.IConcurrentTestManager.Reset(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Resets the PreBurstPlist back to the original.

member.summary: Defines the .

member.summary: Loads the TestProgramSpec JSON file into memory.

member.summary: Loads the BundleSearchSpec JSON file into memory.

member.summary: Loads the ContentSpec JSON file into memory.

member.summary: Builds the ConcurrentTest Manager based on the configuration files.
member.param: Plist name to create the manager for.

member.param: VminForwarding Frequency Corner for this item.

member.summary: Gets the CTT Group name for this object.

member.summary: Gets the CTT Instance name for this object.

member.summary: Gets the name of the VminForwarding Instance associated with this item.
